template.name: OCG: TAG: BIAŁYSTOK
template.css_template: #tag-bialystok-wrap { position: relative;   width: var(--v-width, 190px); height: 40px; transform: translateX(100px); opacity: 0; transition: transform 0.6s cubic-bezier(0.2, 0.8, 0.2, 1), opacity 0.4s ease; z-index: 9999; } .active #tag-bialystok-wrap { transform: translateX(0); opacity: 1; } #tag-bialystok-wrap .live-tag { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; width: var(--v-width, 100%); height: 100%; background: linear-gradient(-45deg, #ffffff, #808080, #404040); background-size: 400% 400%; animation: liveGrad1 4s ease infinite; box-shadow: 0 4px 10px rgba(0,0,0,0.5); } #tag-bialystok-wrap .live-text { font-family: 'Bahnschrift', sans-serif; font-weight: bold; font-size: 25px; color: #ffffff; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 1px; margin- } @keyframes liveGrad1 { 0% { background-position: 0% 50%; } 50% { background-position: 100% 50%; } 100% { background-position: 0% 50%; } }
